_meta.layer: Core Thesis Factory v1 — Single-Name Decision Sheet (单票决策书)

sector_theme.zh: 汽车整车 / 客车 · 出口周期处于盈利顶部
sector_theme.en: Auto OEM / bus · export-cyclical at a profitability peak

ticker_one_context.real_money_consideration: WATCH_NOT_CONVICTION — research posture only, no position; ¥26.04 is PE 10.5 on PEAK earnings, normalized R/R ≈0.67 unfavorable

provenance.research_core_lineage: Cyclical-screen flag (universe cyclical_flag: peak_earnings_risk=true, roe_ttm_vs_median 2.75×, needs_normalized_bridge=true) → peak-earnings NORMALIZATION thesis. Filing-verified + human-red-teamed; numbers used VERBATIM from the FY2025 年报 / 2026Q1 报告.
provenance.generation_note: All load-bearing numbers are filing-verified (FY2025 年报 §分地区/§DuPont base, FY2021-2025 年报, 2026Q1 报告) and human-red-teamed. Reference price = universe_a 2026-06-21 snapshot 26.04 (trade_date 20260618; PE_ttm 10.56, mcap ¥577亿). No committed per-ticker OHLC bar yet — universe fallback price, staleness flagged.
provenance.red_team_record: human-red-teamed; numbers verbatim from filings, not invented.

variant_perception.zh: 市场把宇通读成一只便宜的高质量出口成长股(PE-TTM 10.5、ROE 36%)。我们读成一只处在盈利顶部的出口周期股:当前 ROE 35.6% 是其自身 5 年中位数(13.05%)的 2.75 倍,净利率 13.4% vs 历史 ~2.6%。PE 10.5 是顶部 EPS 上的便宜。这是一个顶部盈利正常化(normalization)论点,不是价值论点。(关键表述纪律:绝不在同一句里说'PE 10 / 9.6% 股息率'而不带'基于顶部盈利 / on peak earnings'。)
variant_perception.en: Market reads 宇通 as a cheap high-quality export grower (PE-TTM 10.5, ROE 36%). We read it as an EXPORT-CYCLICAL AT A PROFITABILITY PEAK: current ROE 35.6% is 2.75× its own 5-year median (13.05%); net margin 13.4% vs ~2.6% history. PE 10.5 is cheap on PEAK EPS. This is a peak-earnings NORMALIZATION thesis, NOT a value thesis. (CRITICAL framing rule — never state 'PE 10 / 9.6% dividend yield' without '基于顶部盈利 / on peak earnings' in the same sentence.)

mechanism.zh: 中国客车出口竞争力 + 海外新能源需求驱动 FY2025 海外收入 +38.9%(首次海外>国内),海外GM 29.62% > 国内GM 19.09%。ROE 上升是真经营(DuPont:净利率 5.7× × 资产周转 1.9×,权益乘数 FLAT-to-down → 不是杠杆),但建立在 ~100% 分红派息造成的结构性偏薄的权益基础上。前瞻摆动问题:13.4% 净利率 / 出口量是新的结构常态,还是周期顶部?
mechanism.en: China bus-export competitiveness + overseas NEV demand drove FY2025 海外收入 +38.9% (first year overseas > domestic), 海外GM 29.62% > 国内GM 19.09%. ROE rise is REAL operating (DuPont: net-margin 5.7× × asset-turnover 1.9×, equity-multiplier FLAT-to-down → not leverage), but on a structurally thin equity base from ~100% dividend payout. Forward swing question: is the 13.4% net margin / export volume the new structural normal or a cycle peak?

thesis.horizon: 6-12mo forward WATCH (E1 proof = 2026 半年报 ~Aug 2026: 出口量 + 海外GM + decel)
thesis.conviction: WATCH_NOT_CONVICTION — the export step-up and operating-driven (not leverage-driven) ROE are real, but ¥26.04 is PE 10.5 on PEAK earnings and the normalized R/R ≈0.67 is unfavorable. Research posture only, no position. STARTER-research trigger ≈¥20.0 (NOT a buy instruction), or a post-H1/annual re-band confirming overseas volume+margin hold through domestic normalization.

items.claim: DuPont ROE 35.6%(期末)=净利率13.4%×周转1.26×权益乘数2.11; 5yr median ROE 13.05%; 权益乘数 flat-to-down 2.40→2.11 (not leverage)
FY2025 OCF ¥31.97亿, OCF/NI 0.576 (−55.67% YoY); the pipeline TTM 0.966 = a 2026Q1 working-capital window artifact (Q1'26 OCF 34.94亿 vs Q1'25 14.17亿)
分红 10派25元 ¥55.35亿 99.65% payout; 3yr cumulative payout 317.99% (thins equity base)
2026Q1 营收 −7.92% YoY, 归母 −12.69% YoY, GM 23.56% (+4.7pp) — decelerating off high base
国内收入 −12.38%; 在手订单 3,662辆/¥52.89亿 (≈7% of FY25 volume, NOT a multi-year book); 公司自述海外"恢复性增长"

rule_x_check.why: PASS — the export-margin mechanism IS issuer-disclosed (分地区 revenue + GM in the annual report) and re-confirmable by future filings (unlike an unconfirmable segment claim).

evidence.contrarian_view: Bull = exports are a structural multi-year global share-gain (China electric buses displacing incumbents), so 13.4% net margin is the NEW normal not a peak; at PE 10.5 + ~9.6% (peak) yield that is cheap. Plausible, but Q1'26 deceleration + "恢复性增长" language + modest 7%-of-volume backlog + domestic −12.4% tilt us to caution.

event.zh: 2026 半年报(出口量 + 海外GM + 减速)
event.en: 2026 H1 report (export units + overseas GM + deceleration)

catalyst_calendar.expected: PRIMARY checkpoint — does the overseas volume+margin hold through domestic normalization

event.zh: 月度产销快报(高频出口量)

catalyst_calendar.expected: normalized full-year净利率 / OCF / region split

triggers.source: 2026 半年报 §产销量 + 月度产销快报

triggers.metric: 2026 中报/年报 海外毛利率
triggers.source: 2026 半年报/年报 §主营业务分地区
FY2026 年报 合并利润表
FY2026 年报 合并现金流量表

note.zh: 五条全部绑强制披露(出口量/海外GM/净利率/OCF/国内收入),任一触发即弃;承重判断是 13.4% 净利率/出口量是结构常态还是周期顶部。
note.en: All five bind to MANDATORY disclosure (export units / overseas GM / net margin / OCF / domestic revenue); any trigger kills the thesis. The load-bearing question is whether the 13.4% net margin / export volume is the structural normal or a cycle peak.

valuation_target_range.basis: Driver-based bridge (units × ASP × region-GM − opex − tax, with FY2025 ¥55.5亿 base reconciliation), then EPS × PE. EPS×PE is [unvalidated intuition]; shares 2,213,939,223 (22.139亿股). De-rate reflects export-cyclical + ~100% payout (no reinvestment growth).

assumptions: 海外销量 −20%, 国内 −15%, 海外GM→25%/国内→17%, 费用率 deleverage ~11% → 归母 ~¥32.6亿, EPS ~1.47, PE 8-9 (de-rate: export-cyclical + ~100% payout, no reinvestment growth)
海外 +20% (structural share-gain + NEV mix), 国内 flat, 海外GM 29.5%/国内 19%, 费用率 ~9.7%, re-rate as structural export grower → 归母 ~¥62.3亿, EPS ~2.81, PE 12-13

valuation_target_range.sensitivity_note: EPS×PE intuition, unvalidated; revenue/归母 bridged from units×ASP×region-GM−opex−tax with FY2025 base reconciliation. 熊/基/牛 mid ≈ 12.5 / 24.0 / 34.5;R/R @ ¥26.04 = (34.5-26.04)/(26.04-12.5) ≈ 0.62(< 2:1),正常化 R/R 不利;STARTER-research 触发 ≈¥20。

summary.zh: WATCH_NOT_CONVICTION。出口结构性向上是真的、ROE 上升是真经营(非杠杆),但 ¥26.04 是顶部盈利的 PE 10.5,正常化 R/R≈0.67 不利。触发 ≤¥20 转 starter-research,或 H1/年报证实海外量+毛利在国内正常化下仍守住。human_executes。
summary.en: WATCH_NOT_CONVICTION. The export step-up and the operating-driven (not leverage-driven) ROE are real, but ¥26.04 is PE 10.5 on PEAK earnings and the normalized R/R ≈0.67 is unfavorable. Trigger ≤¥20 for starter-research, or H1/annual confirmation that overseas volume+margin hold through domestic normalization. human_executes.

execution_plan.entry: research posture only — no position; a 2:1 R/R starter-research trigger sits ≈¥20.0 (NOT a buy instruction)
execution_plan.staging: WATCH — re-band after 2026 半年报; do not initiate at ¥26.04 (peak-EPS price, normalized R/R ≈0.67 unfavorable)
execution_plan.invalidation: thesis: any of the 5 mechanized wrong_if triggers (2026H1 出口销量 YoY < 0 / 海外GM < 26% / FY2026 净利率 < 10% / FY2026 OCF/归母 < 0.5 / 2026 国内收入 YoY < -15%) kills the thesis; price: n/a while flat (no position)
execution_plan.sizing_suggestion: 0 — WATCH_NOT_CONVICTION, research posture only; human_executes (suggestion-only, AI never executes)

serenity.theme_system_change: 中国客车从'廉价出口'向'电动客车全球出口领导'的结构性跃迁 + 海外公交电动化。
value_chain_map: 整车品牌+海外销售/售后服务网络(60+国)[scarcity: high]
KD本地化组装(十余国)[scarcity: medium-准入]
海外政府采购/客户关系 [scarcity: medium-准入]
serenity.scarce_layer: 整车品牌 + 海外销售/售后服务网络 + 60+国渠道(多年构建,难复制)
serenity.company_role: 全球客车出口龙头:累计出口>13万辆、新能源>1.1万辆、60+国、KD在十余国本地化组装。

bottleneck_evidence.claim: 海外GM 29.62% > 国内 19.09% → 海外定价权

serenity.market_may_be_missing: 市场可能没意识到当前 13.4% 净利率/35.6% ROE 是相对自身历史的顶,且 ~100% 分红封死了出口扩张的再投资能力。
serenity.substitution_route: 海外本土客车厂 + 比亚迪/金龙/中通 出口竞争压缩海外毛利;CPO 不适用(实物制造)。
serenity.expansion_difficulty: high — 品牌+海外售后网络+各国认证/homologation+KD建厂 = 数年壁垒。
serenity.customer_validation: 产品进入英国/挪威/荷兰/意大利/墨西哥/智利/菲律宾/澳大利亚/沙特/巴基斯坦;KD厂哈萨克斯坦/巴基斯坦/埃塞俄比亚/马来西亚。

risk.fundamental: peak-earnings normalization — net margin 13.4% vs ~2.6% history, ROE 2.75× its own 5y median; export restock-vs-structural unresolved; domestic revenue −12.4%.
risk.policy: overseas trade/tariff exposure (EU/US/EM bus tariffs), foreign NEV-subsidy changes, RMB FX (海外收入 >50%).
risk.valuation: PE 10.5 is on PEAK EPS — normalized R/R ≈0.67 unfavorable at ¥26.04; the 'cheap PE / 9.6% yield' is peak-earnings cheap, not value.
risk.liquidity: mcap ¥577亿, fully liquid — not a constraint.
risk.crowding_reflexivity: 9.6% (peak) dividend yield + export narrative = crowded long; momentum rank ~70; reflexive downside if the export story breaks.

disclaimers.pilot: internal UNVALIDATED research of the model-recommendation pilot; not validated alpha; not external/personalized advice; sizing is research posture only; human_executes; WATCH not buy; peak-earnings NORMALIZATION thesis NOT a value thesis.
